dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal uses 20-day stochastic (stoch_k and stoch_d are standard 14-period; 20-day variant not available in allowed indicators, so standard stochastic used as closest match). Trend determination inferred via ADX > 20 for uptrend context. Short entry requires stochastic K to penetrate above 80% threshold AND cross below signal line. Long entry requires stochastic K to cross above signal line in uptrend context. Exit conditions reversed from entry crossovers per standard practice.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal uses 20-day stochastic (stoch_k and stoch_d are standard 14-period; 20-day variant not available in allowed indicators, so standard stochastic used as closest match). Trend determination inferred via ADX > 20 for uptrend context. Short entry requires stochastic K to penetrate above 80% threshold AND cross below signal line. Long entry requires stochastic K to cross above signal line in uptrend context. Exit conditions reversed from entry crossovers per standard practice.

source_rule_text: Enter a short sale after the trend has turned down on the first stochastic sell signal (stochastic crosses signal line going down); enter a long after the trend has turned up on the first stochastic buy signal.
